outside_date_extension_note: The outside date of November 16, 2026 may be extended to a later date by mutual written consent of Kennedy-Wilson Holdings, Inc. (with prior approval of the Special Committee) and Kona Bidco, LLC, with no specific extended date or fixed period stated; it also automatically extends by twenty Business Days beyond the resolution date (or court-set date) if any party brings an Action before November 16, 2026.

static_events.label: Approved by the Board; Special Committee recommended

extension_note: The outside date of November 16, 2026 may be extended to a later date by mutual written consent of Kennedy-Wilson Holdings, Inc. (with prior approval of the Special Committee) and Kona Bidco, LLC, with no specific extended date or fixed period stated; it also automatically extends by twenty Business Days beyond the resolution date (or court-set date) if any party brings an Action before November 16, 2026.

downstream.label: HSR Waiting Period Expires
downstream.rule: +30 calendar days after HSR filed (statutory — HSR Act, not stated in merger agreement)

downstream.label: SEC Review Period (13E-3)
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC has 10 business days initial review; comments may follow

downstream.label: 13E-3 / Proxy Cleared by SEC
downstream.rule: SEC staff completes review; company may mail proxy

downstream.label: SEC Proxy Review Period
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC review (typically 10 business days for preliminary proxy)

downstream.label: Proxy Mailed to Shareholders
downstream.rule: After SEC clearance — typically ≥20 calendar days before meeting

downstream.label: Closing
downstream.rule: +3 Business Days after all conditions satisfied / waived

checklist: HSR actual filing date (Kona Bidco, LLC + KW)
Kennedy-Wilson Holdings, Inc. stockholder meeting date (vote)
